creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Mason,
Indeed the HP LaserJet Pro p1109w needs the downloadable driver, according to the official hplip site:
http://hplipopensource.com/hplip-web/models/laserjet/hp_laserjet_professional_p1109w.html

However, the way the FreeBSD port/package of hplip works for downloadable drivers is to additionally install the package "hplip-driver" from ports/print/hplip-driver (rather than allowing hplip to download it, which as you pointed out does not work).

Can you please install this port/pkg, restart your hplip and try detecting and configuring the printer again?
